Hello Geoff, I'm quite sorry - I completely forgot abouth this pr and 
yesterday committed similar change after seeing the error in build 
cluster logs. There is the same problem with py-salt-cloud that I'll 
going to fix now, since the maintainer (Christer) doesn't mind that. 
Thank you for your submission!
